title: Modern Abstract Algebra (3AL)

prerequisites.text: MAM2010F, MAM2011F, MAM2013S and at least one of MAM2012S or MAM2014S.

outline: This course introduces the following areas of Group Theory: the Isomorphism Theorems, p-Groups, Sylow Theory, Direct Products and finitely generated Abelian Groups.
lecture_times: Mondays, Thursdays and some Wednesdays in 5th period.
